subject: feat(mobile): make entire bottom sheet surface draggable
body:
Touch handlers moved from drag handle to the outer sheet container.
Content-area touches are promoted to sheet drags only when the content
is scrolled to top and the user pulls down, preserving normal scrolling
behavior within the sheet content.

Tags: mobile, ui, bottom-sheet, touch
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: minor
